objective: Refactor renderer by responsibility while preserving behavior and public root imports through compatibility facades. Topology: widgets/ owns FractalRenderer, shader loading, error display, gesture mixins, and FractalCanvas; cpu/ owns software fallback formulas/iterators/isolate/tile worker/widget/viewport mapping; validation/ owns render frame checks and convergence detection; policy/ owns backend and deep-zoom precision decisions; providers/ remains controller state management. Root keeps only AGENTS.md plus exact compatibility export facades for externally imported renderer APIs.
completedSlices: Moved widgets/UI rendering files to widgets/: fractal_renderer.dart, fractal_canvas.dart, fractal_painter.dart, gesture_handler.dart, shader_loader.dart; root fractal_renderer.dart preserved as public export facade.

Moved CPU fallback implementation files to cpu/: cpu_formulas.dart, cpu_fractal_renderer.dart, cpu_iteration_budget.dart, cpu_iterators.dart, cpu_render_isolate.dart, cpu_tile_worker.dart, cpu_viewport_mapping.dart; root compatibility facades kept only where external app/tests import them.
Moved validation files to validation/: render_validation.dart, convergence_detector.dart; root compatibility facades preserved for external imports.
Moved policy files to policy/: backend_policy.dart, deep_zoom_precision_policy.dart; root compatibility facades preserved for external imports.
Removed unused root facades for internal-only cpu_iterators.dart, cpu_tile_worker.dart, and fractal_canvas.dart after import search and analyzer validation.
Updated renderer AGENTS.md map to document the new responsibility topology.
